title: AI Literacy Test
text:
# AI Literacy Test

Test real-world AI Literacy skills that matter in a world with AI. Protected by AI proctoring.

## For jobseekers

Practice your skills and earn a certificate of achievement when you score in the top 25%.

Take a Practice Test

## For companies

Screen real AI Literacy skills, flag human or AI assistance, and interview the right people.

Create an AI Literacy Screening Test

From $7 per candidate

## About the test

The AI Literacy test evaluates candidates' practical skill in communicating and collaborating with AI to accomplish work tasks.

This test includes work-sample tasks such as:

* Identifying appropriate uses of AI tools to improve business performance. 
* Writing prompts for AI tools to maximize their accuracy and helpfulness.
* Diagnosing and mitigating unexpected or incorrect responses from AI tools.

Roles such as Content Creators, Customer Support, Data Analysts, and Software Developers all need a solid understanding of how to use AI tools to do their work efficiently and effectively.

AI Literacy

AI Usage

Crafting Prompts

Hallucinations

A small digital marketing agency uses simple prompts with a publicly available AI chatbot with web search, such as Copilot or Bard, to generate initial drafts for short blog posts. However, when the agency prompted the chatbot to “write a blog post on balanced diets,”  it responded surprisingly quickly with a draft that contained made up, or "hallucinated," information. For instance, the AI wrote that "A balanced diet can make you invisible to mosquitos."

How can the prompt be improved to reduce the chance of hallucinations?

Solve Question

Task Suitability

Which of the following tasks are good uses of the chatbot?
